title: Conversational Search, Qualification, and Trust
summary: QuintoAndar's first serious LLM product: conversational and multimodal property search combining natural language, visual retrieval, qualification logic, and trust-sensitive UX.
why_it_matters: This is the clearest public example of AI-native product leadership in the portfolio.

title: Search, Qualification, and Quality
summary: A full-stack search thesis spanning qualification, UI, geographic retrieval, map behavior, and trust in results across rental and for-sale marketplaces.
why_it_matters: This shows the non-gimmick foundations behind the later AI work.

title: From Marketplace Clone to Sales Engine
summary: Operating-model redesign across agent continuity, qualification, lead allocation, and sales flow that helped drive 9x growth in signed contracts.
why_it_matters: This is the strongest organizational and operating-model case in the portfolio.
